label: Raw Object, Import, Validation, Transformation, And Lineage Summary

graphWarnings: Live database content.entity_provenance and content.entity_release_states rows are not exported because no safe DB snapshot input was provided.
Hadith raw object inventory is summarized by subtree, not expanded to every raw object row, to keep CP22-G03 as a backbone checkpoint.
CP22-G04 does not export Quran, translation, or tafsir text bodies from raw files or live DB rows.
CP22-G05 exports hadith acquisition resources and subtree aggregate placeholders; it does not export raw hadith text bodies.
Live product-evidence database rows remain deferred until a safe content schema snapshot is available.

publicBoundary.message: CP26-S03 raw_lineage snapshot is private-only. Public release remains blocked.

warnings: Raw bodies are intentionally omitted from CP26-S03 prototype snapshots.
